MODULE: cosmos.integration.voice
FILE: cosmos/integration/voice.py (737 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Voice Module - Audio Understanding & Speech

Novel Approaches:
1. Streaming Transcription - Real-time Whisper processing
2. Speaker Diarization - Identify different speakers
3. Voice Commands - Natural language voice control
4. Text-to-Speech - Response vocalization

CLASSES:
- AudioFormat(Enum): Supported audio formats.
- AudioInput: Input audio for processing.
- TranscriptionSegment: A segment of transcribed audio.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- TranscriptionResult: Result from audio transcription.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- VoiceCommand: A parsed voice command.
- VoiceModule: Voice interaction system with Whisper transcription.

  Methods: async def speak(self, text: str, rate: int=150, volume: float=1.0, voice_id: Optional[str]=None, out
